checks.a_analysis: The converted document has a significantly different visual organization for many slides. Most notably, slides that are primarily visual (maps, charts, and diagrams) have had those core elements removed, leaving only titles and text. For example, the diagram on page 8 is missing and replaced with a placeholder box. The map and chart-heavy slides (pages 12, 13, 14, 15, 17, 19, 22, 23) no longer center their information around those visual elements. Additionally, the screenshots of data entry forms on page 9 have been converted into an extremely long vertical table (over 100 rows), which completely changes the visual flow and ease of understanding compared to the source's form-based layout.
checks.b_evidence_source: Source PDF pages 8, 9, 12, 13, 14, 15, 17, 19, 22, and 23 show complex layouts centered around diagrams, forms, maps, and charts.
checks.b_evidence_output: The HTML output for these sections removes the primary visual content or converts layout-dependent elements (like forms) into linear lists or tables, destroying the original visual flow and organization of information.
checks.b_evidence_location: Multiple pages including Page 8 (TIMS diagram), Page 9 (PowerSchool forms), Page 19 (Bus trend chart), and Page 22 (Equity map).

checks.a_analysis: Tables present in the source (like on page 16) or tables generated from other elements (like the data on page 17) are rendered as standard HTML tables. They are readable and the data organization within the table remains clear, even if the styling differs from the original presentation.

A significant number of meaningful, non-decorative images and graphics are missing from the output. This includes the central diagram for 'The TIMS System' (page 8), all geographical maps (pages 12, 13, 14, 15, 17, 22, 23), and the data trend chart (page 19). These are not decorative elements; they are the primary content of their respective slides.
checks.b_evidence_source: Page 8: 'The TIMS System' diagram. Page 19: 'Number of Buses Operated' chart. Pages 12, 14, 15, 22, 23: various GIS and growth maps.
checks.b_evidence_output: The HTML screenshots show only text or placeholder elements where these diagrams, charts, and maps should be. For example, a solid green block appears under 'The TIMS System' instead of the diagram.

checks.a_analysis: The content blocks are presented sequentially. While the title and closing slides are identical in the source and output, this is a faithful representation of the original PDF (Page 1 vs Page 24). No unintentional duplication of body content was found.
